percentile_rank_normalize.description: Uniformly distributed values produce evenly spaced percentile ranks

expected.note: Lowest gets rank 0 or ~0, highest gets rank ~100

percentile_rank_normalize.source: Percentile rank: identical values get same rank
percentile_rank_normalize.description: All equal values produce same percentile rank
Single value gets some defined percentile (edge case)

inverted_indicators.source: Scoring CLAUDE.md — inverted indicators flip after normalization
inverted_indicators.description: bb_width, atr_pct, keltner_width are inverted: value = 100 - value

expected.note: For inverted indicators, higher raw value = worse signal = lower normalized score

composite_score.source: Geometric mean composite scoring from scoring/CLAUDE.md
composite_score.description: All indicators at 50th percentile produce composite ~50

expected.note: Geometric mean of equal values = that value

composite_score.source: Geometric mean: floor value 0.5 prevents log(0)
composite_score.description: Zero-valued indicators get floor of 0.5 in geometric mean

expected.note: Floor of 0.5 ensures geometric mean never hits zero

composite_score.source: Composite score range is [1.0, 100.0] with 0.0 for no data

direction_determination.source: scoring/direction.py — ADX gate: weak trend returns NEUTRAL
direction_determination.description: ADX below threshold (15.0) always returns NEUTRAL regardless of other signals

direction_determination.source: scoring/direction.py — strong RSI bullish + aligned SMA

expected.note: RSI overbought gives +2, SMA bullish gives +1 => bullish_score=3 > bearish_score=0

direction_determination.source: scoring/direction.py — strong RSI bearish + aligned SMA

expected.note: RSI oversold gives bear +2, SMA bearish gives bear +1 => bearish_score=3

direction_determination.source: scoring/direction.py — RSI above midpoint but below overbought
direction_determination.description: RSI between 50 and 70 gives mild bullish signal

expected.note: RSI > 50 gives +1, SMA at 0 gives nothing => bullish_score=1 > 0

direction_determination.description: Equal scores with positive SMA breaks tie to BULLISH

expected.note: SMA +1 bull, supertrend -1 bear => tie. SMA > 0 breaks to BULLISH
RSI mild +1, SMA +1, ST +1, ROC +1 => bullish_score=4

direction_determination.source: scoring/direction.py — both scores zero returns NEUTRAL
direction_determination.description: ADX above threshold but RSI at midpoint, no other signals

expected.note: RSI exactly at midpoint triggers neither branch => both scores = 0
